parsed.artifact_title: Event-Loop Append-Only Comparison: Claim Scope and Limitations

claims.text: Artifact non-inferiority uses a declared 0.10 mean quality margin.
Scheduler observability is reported separately from artifact quality.
Provider or transport failure makes the run inconclusive rather than proving model inferiority.

parsed.conclusion: An event-loop append-only comparison supports three bounded claims: (1) non-inferiority is gated on a declared 0.10 mean quality margin, (2) scheduler observability is reported independently of artifact quality, and (3) provider or transport failure renders a run inconclusive rather than proving model inferiority. No claim can be made beyond these facts without additional evidence, and the append-only constraint means no retrospective revision or re-weighting of prior claims is permitted.
declared_losses: Corpus bounded: no claims can extend beyond the three provided evidence records.
Append-only constraint: retrospective revision or re-weighting of prior claims is not permitted.
No external validation: all conclusions are internal to the enclosed comparison framework.
parsed.recommended_action: Proceed with the comparison under the declared 0.10 margin rule. Treat any provider or transport failure as inconclusive and restart the affected run. Monitor scheduler observability separately from quality thresholds.

Scheduler observability is reported separately from artifact quality.
Provider or transport failure makes the run inconclusive rather than proving model inferiority.

request_payload.instruction: Write the final artifact. Cite only evidence records that support claims. Do not cite distractors. If a limitation remains, include it in declared_losses.
request_payload.task: Write a short synthesis note about what can and cannot be claimed from an event-loop append-only comparison.
